title: Neo The Titans
description: "This mod introduces genetically enhanced Titans, designed for modern Minecraft versions (1.21 and above)."
body:
Overview

This mod recreates and optimizes the Titans mod, with content largely consistent with the original Titans mod: it adds giant boss creatures, more equipment, tools, and ores.

Compared to the Original Titans Mod

· Optimized boss animations (attacks and other basic animations, etc.);
· Balanced equipment and creature stats (equipment attack power is not overly exaggerated, bosses are easier to defeat);
· Improved gameplay experience (removed a significant amount of code targeting Creative mode, optimized some boss-related lag, etc.);
· Added some quick commands (e.g., /killTitan);
· Added more Titans related to creatures from newer versions (e.g., Gargantuan Titan);
· Enhanced related textures (e.g., health bar frames and entity textures, etc.).

Notes

· This mod is not a simple recreation; it includes some original innovative content and optimizations for survival gameplay and balance.
· This mod is currently in development, and equipment for certain boss stages has not yet been implemented (some bosses may be slightly overpowered; please wait for future updates).
· This mod currently offers a portion of the normal survival gameplay experience. More content will be added in future updates.
· This mod replaces the vanilla health and armor bars, which can be enabled or disabled in the configuration file.
· Related configuration files and Titan destruction are controlled by the vanilla entity destruction rules.
· Entering and exiting Spectator mode while in a Titan's perspective may cause the game to crash!
（You can use /gamerule mobGriefing false to prevent Titans from destroying blocks.）
Currently Updated Titans

· Wither Skeleton Titan
· Ender Colossus
· Wither Skeleton Titan
· Ghast Titan
· Creaking Titan
· Blaze Titan
· Breeze Titan
· Charged Creeper Titan
· Creeper Titan
· Husk Titan
· Zombie Titan
· Zombie Villager Titan
· Skeleton Titan
· Snow Golem Titan
